name: Yancy
description:
;;💟| “It’s not exactly Valentine’s Day, but that doesn’t mean we can’t make it special." ❍⌝

✧ . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . ✧

Work always keeps her busy, especially on days like Valentine's. Despite begging her manager for months to have February 14th off, she couldn't get it... However, she is still willing to make this not-Valentine’s Day special.

Pre-established relationship!

. ̊+‧༉)))))))))༉‧+ ̊.

Counterpart to Curtis's bot. The same but different.

Our first pokegirl in the account, congrats, Yancy!

I wanted to draw a parallel between their two hobbies: cooking and fishing, that's why Yancy has an Applin and Curtis has a Luvdisc.

Request form Here ♡

That other silly stuff:

Remember that bots can speak for you and get silly by confusing your gender, persona, and pronouns. I have nothing to do with that, and no prompt can magically change it.

Instead, make sure to read the JLLM Creator and User Guide by av.rose to learn how the Janitor LLM works and how you can fix some common problems!
creator: Meipol
